title: Indie Semiconductor Q3 2025 Earnings Disappointment
text: Indie Semiconductor reported disappointing Q3 2025 results, missing both earnings and revenue expectations. EPS: $0.07 loss (vs. $0.05 forecast, 40% worse miss). Revenue: $53.7 million (below $54 million anticipated). Non-GAAP gross margin: 49.6%. Operating losses improved to $11.3 million from $14.5 million in Q2. Stock declined 3% during regular trading hours. Supply chain challenges: substrate supply shortages affecting Q4. Q4 revenue guidance: $54-60 million but approximately $5 million in lost sales due to packaging constraints. Strategic developments: completed Emotion3D acquisition, announced Wuxi subsidiary divestiture for ~$135 million (closing late 2026). Strategic backlog expanded to $7.4 billion.
